title: Advance Learning School (ALS) - Complete Digital Ecosystem
short_description: A three-repository school platform for a multi-branch school: a FastAPI backend (LMS + student information system + finance) driving two Next.js 16 frontends - an 8-role authenticated staff/student portal and a CMS-driven public marketing website.
problem_statement: The school needed a complete digital transformation: a public-facing, SEO-optimized website, a secure portal for administrators, teachers, students, and guardians to manage academic and financial records, and a unified backend to power both systems while keeping each branch's data strictly isolated.
solution_delivered: Developed a decoupled three-part architecture: a FastAPI backend (Python 3.12, SQLAlchemy 2.0 async, PostgreSQL 16, Alembic, Redis, and an Arq worker) organized into eleven bounded contexts (identity, academics, students, enrollment, attendance, finance, assessment, LMS, communication, reporting, CMS); an 8-role authenticated portal (als-portal, Next.js 16 App Router, React 19, shadcn/ui); and a CMS-driven public website (als-website, Next.js 16). Both frontends consume the backend through a single committed OpenAPI contract with generated typed clients. Implemented a full finance suite (fee structures, bulk challan generation, payments, payroll, ledger), a gradebook/assessment module, default-deny RBAC, and defense-in-depth multi-tenancy.
key_achievements: Built a FastAPI modular-monolith backend across eleven bounded contexts with a layered router -> service -> repository design and Alembic migrations for every module.

Enforced defense-in-depth multi-tenancy: an app-layer branch_id auto-filter backed by PostgreSQL Row-Level Security applied per-transaction, chosen to remain correct under PgBouncer transaction pooling.

Implemented a real finance suite: fee structures, bulk challan generation across a section roster, payment recording with status transitions, payroll with a no-double-pay guard, and a running-balance ledger.
Delivered contract-first integration - a single committed OpenAPI schema generates typed clients for both frontends via openapi-typescript, gated by a CI drift check.
Built a BFF security boundary in the portal so the JWT lives only in an httpOnly cookie, with a proxy that injects the Bearer server-side and transparently refreshes on a 401.

Hardened auth and PII: Argon2id password hashing, rotating refresh tokens with reuse detection, application-level column encryption with an HMAC blind index, and a transactional outbox relayed to Redis Streams by a background worker.

client_feedback.quote: The entire system looks amazing and works flawlessly. It has completely transformed how we manage the school.

title: Full-Stack Voucher Management System with Stripe Integration
short_description: Developed a comprehensive voucher management platform with a React admin dashboard, Node.js backend, and integrated Stripe payments to automate sales and distribution.
problem_statement: The client required a centralized system to create, manage, sell, and track digital vouchers for their business. They needed a secure way for administrators to manage inventory, including bulk uploads, and a seamless, automated payment process for customers to purchase and receive vouchers.
solution_delivered: I engineered a full-stack solution featuring a React-based admin dashboard and a secure Node.js/Express.js backend with a MongoDB database. The system provides complete CRUD functionality for vouchers, secure admin authentication using JWT, and role-based access control. Key features include bulk voucher import via CSV and a customizable payment page. The project was delivered in two phases: first, the core management dashboard, and second, a full integration with the Stripe API to handle payment intents and automate the voucher dispensing process upon successful payment.
key_achievements: Built a multi-tenant ready system where each admin receives a unique API key to securely dispense vouchers.
Integrated the Stripe API to create a fully automated payment and voucher delivery workflow.
Developed a bulk upload feature, allowing admins to import thousands of vouchers from a CSV file, saving significant manual effort.
Designed and implemented a comprehensive RESTful API with clear documentation for all system functionalities.

client_feedback.quote: Hi, I have checked the video, looks good and functional.

media.caption: Demo video showcasing the complete voucher management system and Stripe payment flow.

title: Automated Object Dimension Measurement using OpenCV
short_description: Developed a Python script using OpenCV to automatically detect cardboard objects in a video and measure their dimensions (length, width) and distance from a reference point in millimeters.
problem_statement: The client needed an automated method to accurately measure the physical dimensions of multiple cardboard objects shown in a video. Manual measurement was impractical and time-consuming. The required measurements included the length, width, and distance of each object from the video's starting point.
solution_delivered: I created a custom Python script leveraging the OpenCV library for computer vision tasks. The script processes the input video, identifies object contours using image processing techniques, and calculates the bounding box for each detected cardboard object. By using a known reference object for scale calibration, the script accurately converts pixel measurements into millimeters, providing the precise length, width, and positional data for each object as requested.
key_achievements: Achieved high-precision measurements by implementing a robust calibration and object detection algorithm.
Delivered a complete solution, including the Python source code and a demonstration video, ahead of schedule.
The solution successfully handled multiple objects within the video frame, measuring each one individually.
Received a 5-star rating and a significant tip for exceeding client expectations in quality and service.

client_feedback.quote: Brilliant programmer, completed my vision system project above my expectations and on time also. Qamar kept me updated throughout the process. Highly recommended, 10/10 for quality of work and service.

media.caption: Live demonstration of the Python script analyzing a video to measure object dimensions in real-time.

title: Color by Numb3r — Full-Stack E-Commerce & Content Platform
short_description: Architected and deployed a multi-tenant e-commerce and content platform for a creative business, featuring a custom React CMS, automated product syncing, and a robust FastAPI backend.
problem_statement: The client required a scalable, production-ready platform to sell custom coloring books and digital content. The existing tools were insufficient for managing a growing catalog of products, serving different user roles (Designers vs Customers), and handling high-volume traffic. They needed a system that could automatically sync product data from external marketplaces like Bol.com and provide a seamless, branded experience for users to create and purchase custom designs.
solution_delivered: I engineered a complete digital ecosystem hosted on a custom Linux VPS. The backend, built with FastAPI and MongoDB (Beanie), features an automated background sync engine that keeps product inventory and reviews up-to-date with Bol.com. The frontend is a complex React 19 SPA with distinct portals for Customers, Designers, and Admins. I implemented a CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions for zero-downtime deployments and optimized performance using Nginx and in-memory caching. The result is a robust, high-performance platform that handles real-time customization and e-commerce transactions.
key_achievements: Launched a production-live platform serving real customers and designers.
Automated product and review synchronization from Bol.com, reducing manual data entry by 100%.
Implemented a comprehensive Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system to securely manage different user types.
Established a fully automated CI/CD pipeline, enabling rapid and safe iteration.
Optimized site performance and security with Nginx reverse proxy and SSL termination.

client_feedback.quote: Great Work Qamar. Long term partner.

media.caption: Overview of the Color by Numb3r platform, showcasing the store, designer tools, and admin capabilities.
